description_long: This object is a dark, metallic sword with a straight, double-edged blade and a pointed tip. The blade features subtle embossed patterns and geometric designs on both sides, adding a touch of visual interest. The handle is straight and cylindrical, appearing to be made of the same material as the blade, and ends in a simple, rounded pommel. A short, flat crossguard separates the blade from the handle, providing basic hand protection. The surface is glossy and highly reflective, suggesting a polished metal finish. The overall design is utilitarian with minimal ornamentation, suitable for practical use rather than ceremonial display.
description: A straight, double-edged metallic sword with a glossy finish, subtle embossed patterns, and a simple crossguard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the blade with geometric embossing and a clear view of the crossguard and handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's straight geometry.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a different embossed pattern on the blade and the same crossguard and handle structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slimness of the blade and handle, mirroring view 1.
